节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: Provides options that can be set for the Worker instance to create.
Mode in which the Worker instance executes the script. The module type is not supported yet. The default value is classic.
Name of the Worker thread. The default value is undefined.
Whether sharing of the Worker instance is enabled. Currently, sharing is not supported.
Priority of the Worker thread.
Enumerates the priorities available for Worker threads. For details about the mappings between priorities and QoS levels, see QoS Level.
High priority, corresponding to QOS_USER_INITIATED.
Medium priority, corresponding to QOS_DEFAULT.
Low priority, corresponding to QOS_UTILITY.
Background priority, corresponding to QOS_BACKGROUND.
Deadline priority, corresponding to QOS_DEADLINE_REQUEST.
Vip priority, corresponding to QOS_USER_INTERACTIVE.
Defines the event.
Type of the Event.
Timestamp (accurate to millisecond) when the event is created. This parameter is not supported yet.
Provides detailed information about the exception that occurs during worker execution. The ErrorEvent class inherits from Event.
Information about the exception.
File where the exception is located.
Serial number of the line where the exception is located.
Serial number of the column where the exception is located.
Type of the exception.
Holds the data transferred between worker threads.
Data transferred when an exception occurs.
Holds the data transferred between Worker threads.
Data transferred when an exception occurs.

Defines the object for which the ownership is to be transferred during data transfer. The object must be an ArrayBuffer instance. After the ownership is transferred, the object becomes unavailable in the sender and can be used only in the receiver.
ArrayBuffer array used to transfer the ownership. The array cannot be null.
Implements event listening.
Specifies the callback to invoke.
注释信息: @param { Event } evt - evt evt Event class for the callback to invoke.

节点.功能描述: Specifies the worker thread running environment, which is isolated from the host thread environment.
Worker name specified when there is a new worker.
The onerror attribute of parentPort specifies the event handler to be called when an exception occurs during worker execution. The event handler is executed in the worker thread.
Specify the type attribute for self.
Implements the running environment of the Worker thread. The GlobalScope class inherits from WorkerEventTarget.
Worker instance specified when there is a new Worker instance.

Called when an exception occurs during worker execution. The event handler is executed in the Worker thread. In the callback function, the ev type is ErrorEvent, indicating the received abnormal data.
GlobalScope itself.
Specifies the worker thread running environment, which is isolated from the host thread environment

The onmessage attribute of parentPort specifies the event handler to be called then the worker thread receives a message sent by the host thread through worker postMessage. The event handler is executed in the worker thread.
The onmessage attribute of parentPort specifies the event handler to be called then the worker receives a message that cannot be deserialized. The event handler is executed in the worker thread.
Close the worker thread to stop the worker from receiving messages
Send a message to be host thread from the worker

@param { Transferable[] } transfer - transfer array cannot contain null.

节点.功能描述: Implements communication between the Worker thread and the host thread. The postMessage API is used to send messages to the host thread, and the close API is used to terminate the Worker thread. The ThreadWorkerGlobalScope class inherits from GlobalScope9+.

Called when the Worker thread receives a message sent by the host thread through postMessage. The event handler is executed in the Worker thread. In the callback function, this indicates the caller's ThreadWorkerGlobalScope, and the ev type is MessageEvents, indicating the received message data.
注释信息: @throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1.Incorrect parameter types.

节点.功能描述: Sends a message from the Worker thread to the host thread by transferring object ownership or copying data. For details about the supported parameter types, see Sequenceable Data Types. Specifically, the ownership of the objects in the array is transferred to the host thread and becomes unavailable in the Worker thread. The objects are available only in the host thread. If this parameter is not specified, the default value undefined is used, and information is transferred to the host thread by copying data. 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types; 3.Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { Object } messageObject - Data to be sent to the host thread. The data object must be sequenceable.
@param { PostMessageOptions } [options] - If this parameter is specified, it functions the same as ArrayBuffer[].
@throws { BusinessError } 10200004 - The Worker instance is not running.
@throws { BusinessError } 10200006 - An exception occurred during serialization.

parameters.说明: Data to be sent to the host thread. The data object must be sequenceable.
PostMessageOptions } [options] - If this parameter is specified, it functions the same as ArrayBuffer[].

error_codes.description: Parameter error. Possible causes:
The Worker instance is not running.
An exception occurred during serialization.

节点.功能描述: Sends a message from the Worker thread to the host thread. In the message, a sendable object is passed by reference, and a non-sendable object is passed by serialization. For details about the supported sequenceable types, see Sequenceable Data Types. For details about the supported sendable types, see Sendable Data Types. transferred to the host thread. After the transfer, the objects are available only in the host thread. The array cannot be null. The default value is an empty array. 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types; 3.Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { Object } message - Data to be sent to the host thread. The data object must be sequenceable or sendable.
@param { ArrayBuffer[] } [transfer] - ArrayBuffer instance holding an array of objects for which the ownership is
@throws { BusinessError } 10200004 - The Worker instance is not running.
@throws { BusinessError } 10200006 - An exception occurred during serialization.

parameters.说明: Data to be sent to the host thread. The data object must be sequenceable or sendable.
ArrayBuffer[] } [transfer] - ArrayBuffer instance holding an array of objects for which the ownership is

error_codes.description: Parameter error. Possible causes:
The Worker instance is not running.

节点.功能描述: Calls a method of an object registered with the host thread. This API is called by the Worker thread. The invoking is synchronous for the Worker thread and asynchronous for the host thread. The return value is transferred through serialization. or return results asynchronously by using the asynchronous mechanism at the bottom layer. Otherwise, an exception is thrown. The value is an integer ranging from 1 to 5000. The value 0 means that the 5000 ms duration is used. 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types; 3.Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { string } instanceName - Key used for registration. It is used to search for the object in the host thread.
@param { string } methodName - Name of the method to call. Note that the method cannot be modified by async or generator,
@param { number } timeout - Maximum duration that the current synchronous invoking waits, in ms.
@param { Object[] } args - the method argument called on registered globalCallObject.
@returns { Object } Return the result of method if it has a return value, otherwise return void.
@throws { BusinessError } 10200004 - Worker instance is not running.
@throws { BusinessError } 10200006 - An exception occurred during serialization.
@throws { BusinessError } 10200019 - The globalCallObject is not registered.
@throws { BusinessError } 10200020 - The method to be called is not callable or is an async method or a generator.
@throws { BusinessError } 10200021 - The global call exceeds the timeout.

parameters.说明: Key used for registration. It is used to search for the object in the host thread.
Name of the method to call. Note that the method cannot be modified by async or generator,
Maximum duration that the current synchronous invoking waits, in ms.
the method argument called on registered globalCallObject.

节点.return_description: Return the result of method if it has a return value, otherwise return void.

error_codes.description: Parameter error. Possible causes:
Worker instance is not running.
An exception occurred during serialization.
The globalCallObject is not registered.
The method to be called is not callable or is an async method or a generator.
The global call exceeds the timeout.

节点.功能描述: Called when an exception occurs within the lifecycle of the Worker thread. The event handler is executed in the host thread. onerror can capture only exceptions generated by synchronous methods within the onmessage callback. It cannot capture exceptions from multithreaded callbacks or modularization-related exceptions. Once an exception is captured, the Worker thread will proceed to the destruction process and cannot be used. onAllErrors can capture global exceptions generated during the onmessage callback, timer callback, and file execution of the Worker thread. After an exception is captured by onAllErrors, the Worker thread remains alive and can continue to be used. You are advised to use onAllErrors instead of onerror.
注释信息: @throws { BusinessError } 10200004 - The Worker instance is not running.
@throws { BusinessError } 10200005 - The called API is not supported in the worker thread.

The called API is not supported in the worker thread.
